'''Galek''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of long-lived [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Galek trees lived for hundreds of [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and grew to tall heights over the [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]].<ref name="Sacrifice" /> The leaves that grew on the galek tree's branches were known for their [[Silver/Legends|silver]] [[Color/Legends|coloration]], appearing in contrast to the yellow [[amber fern]]s that were a common sight growing among the galek forests on Mandalore.<ref name="TCSWE" />

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attacked]] Mandalore during [[Yuuzhan Vong War|their invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the galek tree groves near Mandalore's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]], [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]], were among the few areas of the planet the Vong did not target for destruction. In the year [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] retrieved the remains of his [[Death/Legends|deceased]] [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango]], from the red sand [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] and brought them to Mandalore. There, in one of the undisturbed galek tree groves not far from the [[Kelita River]], Fett buried his father's remains next to those of his daughter's, [[Ailyn Vel]]. He later visited the galek-encircled graves a number of [[Time/Legends|times]], both alone and in the company of his granddaughter, [[Mirta Gev]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Behind the scenes==
Galek trees were first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel, [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[May 29]], [[2007]].<ref name="Sacrifice" /> The following year, in [[2008]], ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' featured an informational entry on galek trees.<ref name="TCSWE" />
